title: Glowing Totem
body:
# Glowing Totem

Illuminate your path in the darkness with the Glowing Totem! This custom Minecraft pack transforms the Totem of Undying into a light source, thanks to the power of Lamb Dynamic Light. Not only do you get the protection of immortality, but you also have a radiant guide by your side.

## Key Features:
- **Dynamic Lighting:** Harness the technology of Lamb Dynamic Light to make your totem shine, providing a constant light source in the darkest adventures.
- **Advanced Compatibility:** Successfully tested with various shader packs, including the popular Complementary Reimagined, ensuring an extraordinary visual experience.

### Installation:
1. Download and install the Glowing Totem Resource Pack.
2. Ensure you have Lamb Dynamic Light installed to fully leverage the totem's brightness.
3. Enjoy the new look and functionality of the Totem of Undying!
